The Watchers (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,164,028Details
International Box Office $14,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $33,464,028
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $345,329
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $226,497
Total $571,826
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Mina, a 28-year-old artist, gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. When Mina finds shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers who are watched and stalked by mysterious creatures each night.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,003,537 (36.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.74 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,351 opening theaters/3,351 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $20,265,407

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 7th, 2024 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: June 5th, 2024 (Wide) (Malaysia)
June 5th, 2024 (Wide) (Philippines)
June 6th, 2024 (Wide) (Germany)
June 6th, 2024 (Wide) (Croatia)
June 6th, 2024 (Wide), released as The Watchers: Eles Veem Tudo (Portugal)
Video Release: June 28th, 2024 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, terror and some thematic elements.
Running Time: 102 minutes
Filming location (country): Ireland
Plot point: Fairies
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blinding Edge Pictures, New Line Cinema, Inimitable Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
